name: bookstack-mcp
description: BookStack wiki MCP server — search, read, create, and manage documentation

bookstack_base_url.title: BookStack URL
bookstack_base_url.description: Base URL of your BookStack instance (e.g. https://your-bookstack.com).

bookstack_token_id.title: API Token ID
bookstack_token_id.description: BookStack API Token ID. Stored in your OS keychain.

bookstack_token_secret.title: API Token Secret
bookstack_token_secret.description: BookStack API Token Secret. Stored in your OS keychain.

bookstack_enable_write.title: Enable Write Operations
bookstack_enable_write.description: Set to "true" to enable write tools (create/update/delete pages, books, chapters). Leave as "false" for read-only access.

bookstack_insecure_skip_tls_verify.title: Skip TLS Verification
bookstack_insecure_skip_tls_verify.description: Set to "true" to skip SSL certificate validation (for self-signed / LAN BookStack instances). Leave as "false" otherwise.
